libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Set native test runtime system properties for 5.0.1: -Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow and -Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true. Meaningful coverage can use an embedded Vert.x HttpServer on localhost for WebClient requests, JSON bodies, forms, multipart upload, streaming, redirects, cookies/sessions, and caching; no external service or Docker image is required. Avoid optional OAuth2WebClient coverage unless adding the optional io.vertx:vertx-auth-oauth2 dependency is intentionally in scope.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The existing 5.0.0 test setup gates the Netty runtime properties to exactly version 5.0.0, so a generated 5.0.1 path may miss them unless explicitly updated.
The system-property need is specific to native-image runtime on newer JDKs/Netty 4.2.x; local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 is self-contained for meaningful tests, but its Vert.x 5.0.1 dependency stack resolves Netty 4.2.2.Final, so Java 25 native-image runtime tests need the same Netty unsafe/reflection system properties already used for 5.0.0.
